beforeDevCommand.script: dx build --release --platform web --debug-symbols false && mkdir -p dist && rm -rf dist/* && cp -R ../target/dx/presentation_frontend/release/web/public/. dist/

beforeBuildCommand.script: dx build --release --platform web --debug-symbols false && mkdir -p dist && rm -rf dist/* && cp -R ../target/dx/presentation_frontend/release/web/public/. dist/
